groundingDensity: moderate — the source chapter was already structurally strong and partially grounded, so this pass concentrated on architectural/material specificity, institutional naming, and Jaina-specific field-memory anchors without bloating the sanctum duel

scenes.title: Sanctum and threshold
focus: Barov and Kirin Tor visual register
material specificity for desk, shelves, jars, and the salt-dry air

scenes.title: Mechanism, ethics, and scale
focus: Council of Six and Violet Citadel framing for the necromancy ban
old ward-lines, vellum, iron-gall, oak, and flagstone as tactile support
differentiated pressure curve: mechanism -> ethics -> mirror -> Northrend / Burning Legion scale

scenes.title: Sylvanas's approach
focus: iron door and threshold emphasis without fragment expansion
aftermath tableau sharpened through Jaina's fear of what Sylvanas will see

constraintsObeyed.antiBloat: Scene-end approach beats kept tight; 'Stair. Landing. Stair again.' remained intact.
constraintsObeyed.antiWiki: No lore blocks inserted; names surface only where Jaina would naturally think or speak them.
constraintsObeyed.pov: All additions route through Jaina's scholarly and field-conditioned lens.
constraintsObeyed.subtext: Kel'Thuzad's appetite stays mostly in composure slips and phrasing, not explanation.
